title: Party Balloons 12" Decorator Balloons - Range of Unique Colours (Shimmering Silver (Pearlised), 8 Pack)
features: PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASSION: These balloons can be used for Valentine's Day, birthdays, weddings, anniversaries and events, romantic love party balloons decorations.
GREAT ADD ON: Combine these with other party supplies or mix with printed and other solid tableware to personalize your party table and party. You can celebrate with a bang!

SAFETY TIPS: Do not overfill the ball to avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects and excessive friction, which can be filled with air and helium. Need to prepare helium and air by yourself.
description: Decorator quality balloons with a wide range of unique colours. Ideal for any party
